content.rule_text: The agreement must include explicit provisions for GDPR compliance, including data processing terms, data subject rights, and breach notification procedures within 72 hours.
Payment terms must not exceed Net 30 days from invoice date. Any payment terms beyond 30 days require CFO approval and must include late payment interest provisions.
The agreement must include a termination for convenience clause allowing either party to exit with no more than 60 days written notice, without excessive termination fees.
Liability caps should not exceed two times (2x) the annual contract value. Any limitation of liability clause must carve out exceptions for gross negligence, willful misconduct, and data breaches.
